commit.message:
ci: fix release workflow — move secrets checks to job-level env vars

GitHub Actions does not support `secrets.*` context in `if:` expressions.
Move all `secrets.X != ''` checks to job-level `env:` as boolean env vars
(HAS_APPLE_CERT, HAS_APPLE_ID, HAS_WIN_CERT, HAS_GPG_KEY), then reference
`env.HAS_X` in step `if:` conditions.

Also add `if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')` guards on all jobs so
branch pushes never queue jobs and show spurious failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(ios): Add string localization for SwiftUI (#960)

* feat(ios): Add string localization infrastructure for SwiftUI

Replace ~120 hardcoded English strings across 14 SwiftUI feature files
with localization keys backed by a new Localizable.strings file.

- Create iosApp/Localizable.strings with ~130 key-value pairs organized
  by screen (home, device_detail, add_device, edit_device, device_types,
  add_event, edit_event, event_detail, history, ai_chat, login, settings)
- Replace hardcoded strings in Text(), Button(), .navigationTitle(),
  TextField(), Picker(), DatePicker(), DisclosureGroup(), ProgressView(),
  .alert(), .accessibilityLabel(), and .accessibilityHint() with
  localization keys
- Use String(localized:) for non-SwiftUI contexts (LoginViewModelWrapper
  error strings, ternary fallback values)
- Add titleKey and localizedName helpers to MainTab for tab localization
- Localizable.strings auto-included via PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup

Add figures to Counterfactual Memorization blog posts (KO + EN)

Extracted 11 figures from the paper's PDF sources and converted
to PNG. Added 8 key figures to both KO and EN blog posts:
scatter plot, memorization-simplicity distribution, domain analysis,
convergence, training dynamics, duplication correlation, influence
distribution, and Grover-Mega generation influence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 深淺模式切換即時生效 & 淺色卡片視覺強化

- 修復 HomeRootContainerView 重複建立 ThemeStore 導致設定頁改深淺模式無效的問題
  （改為 @EnvironmentObject 讀取 MyApp 注入的實例）
- ThemeStore 新增 isDark 屬性，所有自訂 UI 直接讀取，不依賴 @Environment(\.colorScheme)
- ThemeModifier 加入 .environment(\.colorScheme, resolved) 確保子視圖也拿到正確色系
- MyApp 加入 window 層級 .preferredColorScheme 確保狀態列等系統 UI 同步切換
- 所有主畫面元件（背景、面板、Tab、FAB、卡片）顏色全面改為 theme.isDark 自適應
- 淺色模式卡片改用純白背景 + 陰影 + 邊框，在淺灰面板上更明顯

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: tune AI weights v5 — reduce wild/attack overuse, increase buying

Lower wild base score (20→10) with pair-in-hand penalty (0.3x), reduce
default wild weight (1.0→0.5). Cut attack base scores ~50% and lower
attack weights across all personas. Raise default buy weight (0.3→0.4)
to help deplete Major deck faster. Games now ~9.3 rounds (was 10.0),
wild usage halved, simulation speed nearly doubled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(tiering): fix flaky op_manager_test by waiting for cancelled stash IOs (#6852)

WaitForPendingStashes only checked pending_stash_cnt, which tracks
version-matching stash completions. Cancelled stash IOs (superseded
by newer stashes for the same id) could still be in flight, leaving
allocated_bytes inflated when the assertion ran. Also wait for
pending_ops to drain so all IO callbacks (including cancellation
frees) complete before checking allocated_bytes.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: Replace try-catch with Result pattern in AI use cases (#962)

Refactor 4 AI-related use cases to use Result<T, DataError.Ai> instead
of raw try-catch with null/exception returns:

- SuggestDeviceIconUseCase: returns Result<String, DataError.Ai> instead
  of String? (null on error)
- BatchAddDevicesUseCase: extract generateAiResponse() returning Result
- BatchAddDeviceTypesUseCase: same pattern
- BatchAddBatteryEventsUseCase: same pattern

Update AddDeviceTypeViewModel to handle Result from SuggestDeviceIconUseCase
with structured when-expression, surfacing errors via actionError state.

Update SuggestDeviceIconUseCaseTest assertions for new Result return type.

commit.message:
feat: improve genderize.io accuracy with diacritics and compound name handling

Strip diacritical marks (José → Jose) and take first component of
hyphenated names (Jean-Pierre → Jean) before querying genderize.io,
per Santamaría & Mihaljević (2018). Reduces unrecognized names from
~16% to <1%.

fix(cli): auto-fix lint issues in generated pre-commit hooks

Use `biome check --write` and `eslint --fix` with stage_fixed in
generated lint hooks so auto-fixable issues don't block commits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(test): update musicfetch-enrichment tests to expect throws not error returns (#5670)

The implementation was updated (JOV-1493) to throw on missing token and no API data
so jobs fail and retry rather than silently succeed. The tests still expected the old
error-return behavior, causing CI to fail on every main push.

Updated two tests to use `rejects.toThrow()` assertions:
- 'throws when MusicFetch is unavailable'
- 'throws when MusicFetch API returns no data'

commit.message:
fix: use variable proxy_pass to prevent nginx DNS resolution blocking startup

Nginx resolves proxy_pass hostnames at config load time when using
hardcoded URLs. If the backend DNS isn't resolvable, nginx refuses to
start entirely, causing Railway healthcheck to fail. Switch to a
$backend_upstream variable so DNS resolves at request time instead.

Also removes the 5s PORT wait loop to speed up container startup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch OpenAI model to gpt-5.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Harden WebSocket broadcast: lock timeout, signal timeout, error fallback

- Add 10s timeout on payload lock acquisition to prevent deadlocks
- Add 5s timeout on signal_engine.generate_all_signals()
- Wrap correlation matrix in try-except
- Add _safe_default JSON serializer for numpy types
- Return minimal fallback payload on any build error
- Stream retries up to 10 consecutive errors before dying

Replace dynamic labels with fixed 34-label taxonomy

- AI prompt now selects only from the predefined list
- Dashboard: single color-coded label chart, thematic pill colors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add sistema_maestro wrapper and API/Dashboard launchers

- sistema_maestro.py: wrapper that redirects to src/agencia/agents/cerebro/
- api_agencia.py: wrapper in cerebro/ redirecting to tecnologia/
- dashboard_web.py: wrapper in cerebro/ redirecting to herramientas/
- arrancar.bat: check localhost:8000/ instead of /docs, increase timeout to 60s

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add title+date matching strategy to ce-import-galleries

Third matching strategy for galleries that lack both SHA256 hashes and
CE URLs. Normalizes titles (strip + lowercase) and joins on title+date
within studio scope. Skips ambiguous matches on both CE and Stash sides.
Also refactors shared data fetching so studio galleries and CE releases
are fetched once and passed to all three strategies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add AppTypography and introduce Plus Jakarta Sans / Inter font pairing

Create FrontEnd/lib/config/app_typography.dart as the single source of
truth for all text styles. All GoogleFonts.inter() calls removed from
theme.dart — it now references AppTypography.* constants instead.

Font pairing:
- Plus Jakarta Sans (w700–w800, tight letter-spacing) for display,
  headline, title, and app bar — expressive at large sizes
- Inter for body, labels, buttons, inputs, nav, chips — legible at
  small sizes

Body line-height bumped 1.5→1.6 for a more airy, editorial feel.
Verified: flutter analyze — no issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove Python backend: use Web Serial API for OpenBCI Cyton

- Add cyton-serial.ts: direct Cyton USB serial via Web Serial API,
  33-byte packet parsing, ADS1299/LIS3DH scaling, and synthetic EEG
  generator ported from Python (regional freqs, sweeping envelope,
  pink noise, accel sway)
- Add dsp.ts: 2nd-order Butterworth IIR bandpass filter (1–50 Hz)
  for real-time per-channel filtering in the browser
- Replace socket.ts WebSocket client with thin adapter over CytonSource;
  auto-starts synthetic on unsupported browsers
- Replace api.ts backend fetch calls with in-memory recording +
  per-channel CSV download on stop
- Update main.ts: Connect Cyton button (Web Serial browsers only),
  Use Synthetic button, mode status pill
- Remove analysis UI from recorder-ui.ts (requires Python backend)
- Fix brain.glb path to use import.meta.env.BASE_URL for GitHub Pages
- Update vite.config.ts: remove backend proxy, add base /NeuroAIHackathon/
- Add .github/workflows/deploy.yml for GitHub Pages CI/CD

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update D+E.3 to DONE across all PRD/SD documents

D (orphan resume) and E.3 (persistent requeue) completed via
PRD-COBUILDER-CONSOLIDATION-001 E2. SD hardening now 9/10 epics done,
only F (global safeguards) remains, absorbed into E4-E5.
